senses.gloss: to be or become annoyed, discontented, dissatisfied, impatient, irked, irritated, restless
to be or become bored, tired or weary of

examples.english: I am tired of repeating it to you.

senses.gloss: to be or become fed up with, to be unable to bear or tolerate
to be or become surfeited, satiated, or jaded with

examples.text: سَئِمْتُ تَكَالِيفَ الحَيَاةِ وَمَن يَعِش / ثَمَانِينَ حَوْلًا لَا أَبَا لَكَ يَسَأَمِ
examples.english: I weary of the offices of life: whoever lives / Around eighty cycles would weary; this, I promise you.
